_doc: Tier-1 MBA seed buckets template. Source workbook (Tier1_MBA_Bucket_Framework.xlsx) requires manual curation — only a small high-confidence starter set is included here. Add more buckets to the `buckets` array following the same shape and rerun scripts/seed-job-buckets.ts.

buckets.name: Management Consulting — MBB / Big 4 Strategy
buckets.nature_of_work: Top-tier strategy consulting; corporate strategy, M&A, growth, transformation; case-led problem solving; client engagement

buckets.name: Investment Banking — Front Office
buckets.nature_of_work: M&A advisory; capital markets; financial modelling; pitch books; client coverage; deal execution

buckets.name: Commercial Excellence, Enterprise & Channel Sales
buckets.nature_of_work: Channel and distributor management; trade marketing; enterprise account management; commercial excellence; revenue growth
